They kind of get missed and not thought about as everyone associates the Cable Cars with SF but these trams are really cool. They have each come from a different city around the US and some still have their location on the side. They are really retro and can be seen a lot around Fisherman's Wharf.

These old streetcars have been imported from variou cities around the world.  Each one is slightly different.  They are rolling history, but also very practical public transit.  We rode one from Civic Center to Fisherman's Wharf, and another one back downtown.  They travel the Embarcadero and Market Street.
